# workbench_workspace (Data Source)

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "workbench_workspace" "my_workspace" {
  id = "12345678-9012-3456-7890-123456789012"
}
data "workbench_workspace" "my_workspace_by_user_facing_id" {
  user_facing_id = "my-workspace"
}

output "my_workspace" {
  value = {
    my_workspace                   = data.workbench_workspace.my_workspace
    my_workspace_by_user_facing_id = data.workbench_workspace.my_workspace_by_user_facing_id
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Optional

- `description` (String) Workbench workspace description
- `display_name` (String) Workbench workspace display name
- `id` (String) Workbench workspace UUID
- `location` (String) Workbench workspace default resource location
- `organization_id` (String) Workbench workspace organization id
- `pod_id` (String) Workbench workspace pod id
- `policies` (Attributes List) Workbench workspace policies (see
  [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))
- `properties` (Attributes List) Workbench workspace properties in key-value pair (see
  [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--properties))
- `user_facing_id` (String) Workbench workspace user facing id

### Read-Only

- `aws_account_id` (String) AWS account ID associated with the workspace (if AWS workspace)
- `created_by` (String) Workbench workspace created by
- `created_date` (String) Workbench workspace created date
- `gcp_project_id` (String) GCP project ID associated with the workspace (if GCP workspace)
- `last_updated_by` (String) Workbench workspace last updated by
- `last_updated_date` (String) Workbench workspace last updated date

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>

### Nested Schema for `policies`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name of the policy
- `namespace` (String) Namespace of the policy

Optional:

- `additional_data` (Attributes List) Additional data for the policy (see
  [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies--additional_data))

<a id="nestedatt--policies--additional_data"></a>

### Nested Schema for `policies.additional_data`

Required:

- `key` (String) Key of the additional data
- `value` (String) Value of the additional data

<a id="nestedatt--properties"></a>

### Nested Schema for `properties`

Required:

- `key` (String) Key of the property
- `value` (String) Value of the property
